phase: FAZ 0 v2 -- Stage 0 pre-registration (revize: evren + horizon-overlap)
supersedes_design_of: D-177 STAGE0 (faz0-v1); D-177 sonuclari referans olarak KORUNUR (docs/factor_ic/faz0_results.json), ezilmez.
discipline: Definitions/universe-rule/ADV-floor/horizons/keep-rule + snapshot hash frozen BEFORE measurement. N budget: this is the 2nd of <=3 designs.

fix1_universe.problem_v1: config.yaml portfolio.tickers = 57 curated names -> weak cross-sectional power (NOT a yfinance/liquidity drop; yfinance dropped 0).
fix1_universe.candidate_pool_rule: MECHANICAL: candidate pool = BIST 100 (XU100) index constituents; ALL constituents included; NO judgmental drop for liquidity, NO cherry-pick by expected IC. List accuracy is a documented DATA LIMIT, not selection bias.
fix1_universe.candidate_source: BIST 100 (XU100) index membership, point-in-time ~2025-2026 (frozen in faz0_config.FAZ0_BIST100_CONSTITUENTS)
fix1_universe.adv_method: median daily TL volume (Close x Volume) over the snapshot window; >= floor passes
fix1_universe.adv_floor_rationale: result-independent frozen floor; illiquid tail would be dropped by Faz 1 ADV gate anyway -> measuring IC on untradeable names is misleading. NOT tuned to a target count.

survivorship.reason: not fetchable from yfinance (404) -> survivors-only (D-177 ile ayni; alternatif kaynak YAPILMADI)
survivorship.bias_direction: Excluding delisted (mostly poor-outcome) names may make measured IC read OPTIMISTIC/inflated; TEST 2 skewness biased UP (high-vol falsely good). Read as upper-ish bound. (the maintainer condition: bias direction reported.)

fix2_overlap_correction.problem_v1: naive t inflated by overlapping daily forward-return windows (D-177 rs12 h63: naive t=13.23, ICIR 0.119->0.860 monotonic = possible mechanical artifact).
fix2_overlap_correction.honest_t: Newey-West HAC, Bartlett bandwidth = horizon h (not the fixed lag=5 used in v1).
fix2_overlap_correction.nonoverlap_icir: subsample daily IC series at stride=h (disjoint windows) -> ICIR + t; reveals if horizon ICIR rise is real (still rises) or artifact (flattens).
fix2_overlap_correction.reported: both naive_t and honest_t per factor x horizon; non-overlap ICIR/t per factor x horizon.

fix3_keep_rule.primary_horizon_justification: THEORY (3-12 month momentum literature), frozen BEFORE results -- NOT a post-hoc pick of h=63 because it looked good in D-177.
fix3_keep_rule.keep_rule: KEEP a factor if ANY ELIGIBLE h in {21,63} has |honest_t| >= 2.0 AND non-overlap ICIR >= 0.5. A horizon is ELIGIBLE only if its non-overlap n >= 12 (min_nonoverlap_n).

bar_justification.honest_t_min_2.0: = thresholds.py IC_INVESTABLE_TSTAT_MIN (existed BEFORE D-177; result-independent) + classic t~=2 (~95%) convention. NOT chosen for this measurement.
bar_justification.min_nonoverlap_n_12: ICIR=mean/std is meaningless on a handful of points (h=63 ~4 disjoint obs -> ICIR like 28.9 trivially clears 0.5). Require ~1yr of monthly-spaced independent obs. Result-independent and STRICTER (excludes thin horizons, never rescues).

fix3_keep_rule.rs_rule: RS standalone IC <= 0 -> drop OR convert to short-term reversal (Bildik-Gulay).
fix3_keep_rule.DEC-039: honest_t will be MEASURED, not estimated. If rs12 honest_t < 2.0 OR non-overlap ICIR < 0.5 -> rs12 DROPS. No rescue operation; honestly 'lead-but-not-confirmed'.

stage0_dryrun_corrections.note: A Stage-0 dry-run shakedown (before recorded measurement) found TWO result-independent implementation flaws; both fixed here, both make the measurement MORE correct / the gate STRICTER (never a rescue).
stage0_dryrun_corrections.fix_realized_vol_min_periods: realized_vol used rolling(window).std() with default min_periods=window. BIST names have ~23 scattered halt/non-trading days each over 605 dates; on a union calendar a single NaN in a 60-day window nulled the vol, collapsing the low-vol cross-section to ~113 usable dates (vs ~560). Fixed: min_periods=ceil(0.75*window) -> halt-gap robust, still look-ahead safe. Windows 20/60 UNCHANGED.
stage0_dryrun_corrections.fix_keep_min_nonoverlap_n: Added FAZ0_MIN_NONOVERLAP_N=12 horizon eligibility (see keep_rule) to guard the tiny-sample ICIR artifact at h63.

unchanged_from_v1: factors (RS 6/12 skip-1 + low-vol 20/60; value still Faz 0b) - IC=SPEARMAN - TEST 1 dilution (re-measured) - TEST 2 group-conditional skewness (diagnostic, block-bootstrap CI, 3 warnings) - snapshot freeze+hash+determinism - Stage 0 ordering (commit BEFORE measurement) - screening/ isolation - ic_source equivalence (+ D-177 n-match hardening) - cp1254 ASCII comments.

ic_method.metric: Spearman rank-IC (NOT Pearson; keeps TEST 2 orthogonal)
ic_method.equivalence_rule: local daily-IC series == primitive at 5-decimal precision (<1e-9) AND n_obs match; ic_source recorded primitive|fallback

decision_owner: the project (DEC-039). Harness MEASURES and RECOMMENDS; does not finalize factor set.
